action.reasoning: Observation: I've achieved a new best accuracy of 46.34% using cleanlab to identify and exclude noisy labels, combined with ResNet50, focal loss (gamma=2), and label smoothing. This represents a significant improvement over the previous best of 44.79%. The cleanlab approach appears to be working well for handling the label noise in CIFAR-100N. Analysis: The combination of techniques is proving effective: 1) Cleanlab for identifying mislabeled samples, 2) Focal loss to focus on hard examples, and 3) Label smoothing for regularization. I have 7 remaining iterations and 3.46 hours of compute time, so I can continue optimizing. Decision: I'll try to further improve the model by experimenting with different cleanlab parameters to refine the label cleaning process, potentially adjusting the focal loss gamma parameter, and maybe trying a different pre-trained model like ConvNeXt Tiny which is also pre-downloaded.
